name: duolingo-streak
author: Node-RED Conversion
description-cn: 显示多邻国连续打卡天数

inputs.label: Duolingo UUID
inputs.description: Get your user UUID from the Duolingo API or from the logged_out_uuid browser cookie.
inputs.description-cn: 打开 Duolingo 登录后的接口或从 logged_out_uuid Cookie 获取用户 UUID，然后填入这里。

headers.User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/80.0.3987.163 Safari/537.36
